meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' wall by building a sophisticated user onboarding flow. Learn advanced techniques using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for project ideas and start building an advanced user onboarding system. By mastering friction-less sign-up flows, interactive product tours, and data-driven personalization, you solve a universal SaaS pain point while building a high-value portfolio piece that demonstrates technical maturity and deep empathy for user experience.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the developer's greatest adversary. You’ve mastered the syntax, you’ve memorized the frameworks, yet when you sit down to build, the 'what' remains elusive. You aren't suffering from a lack of skill; you are suffering from a lack of focus on the most critical phase of any digital product: the first sixty seconds.

User onboarding is the bridge between a visitor and a loyal customer. By treating onboarding as a complex engineering challenge—rather than a design afterthought—you transform your portfolio from a list of basic clones into a showcase of high-end product architecture. This is where you prove you can solve real-world churn.

steps.title: Architecting the State Machine
steps.description: Define the user journey states using a finite state machine to manage onboarding progress, ensuring the user can resume exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine schema for a multi-step SaaS onboarding flow including 'welcome', 'profile_setup', 'tutorial_walkthrough', and 'dashboard_active' states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Create a state machine implementation in TypeScript using XState for a 4-step onboarding process.'

steps.title: Implementing Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Build an interactive guide that triggers based on specific user actions rather than a static linear walk-through.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component using Framer Motion for contextual tooltips that attach to DOM elements based on user interaction triggers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/components/Tooltip.tsx' --instructions 'Implement a hook-based tooltip system that calculates position relative to target elements.'

steps.title: Data-Driven Personalization
steps.description: Capture user inputs during onboarding to dynamically modify the dashboard UI, demonstrating your ability to handle conditional data rendering.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer function that processes onboarding survey results to build a user profile object used for personalized dashboard recommendations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Develop a profile service that updates user preferences in Supabase based on completed onboarding steps.'

steps.title: Handling Drop-off Analytics
steps.description: Integrate event tracking to identify exactly where users abandon the onboarding process, a critical skill for senior engineers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement an analytics middleware that fires events for each onboarding step completion and identifies abandonment points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/lib/analytics.ts' --instructions 'Add tracking for onboarding completion percentages and segment drop-off points.'

steps.title: Optimizing for Performance
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding assets are lazy-loaded to prevent bloat and maintain a 90+ Lighthouse score.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding component tree to use dynamic imports and code-splitting, ensuring minimal impact on initial load time.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Analyze bundle size and implement dynamic imports for all onboarding sub-components.'

pro_tips: Always design your onboarding to be 'skippable'—forcing users through a tunnel is the fastest way to drive them to your competitor.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates during onboarding so the user feels the system is responding instantly, even while database writes happen in the background.
Implement a 'checkpoint save' strategy; never force a user to restart the onboarding flow if they refresh their browser.
Treat onboarding as a product feature with its own unit tests; a broken onboarding flow is a 100% churn rate event.
Incorporate 'micro-wins'—show a progress bar or celebratory animation when a step is completed to trigger a dopamine hit and maintain momentum.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, deploy your project to Vercel and implement a 'feedback loop' where you ask users for their thoughts on the sign-up experience.
content.conversion_block: Your portfolio needs depth, not just another to-do list. By mastering complex user flows, you position yourself as a senior-level thinker. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
